name: profile loader rejects a severity value that is not in the {off, warn, error, 0, 1, 2} set or a two-element array starting with one of those
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: critical\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_severity=critical' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=off|warn|error|0|1|2' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
